# BIGTIME POS

## Item 4 Compliance Sample

### Sample print-out of Official Receipts (OR) / Sales Invoices (SI)

This document is prepared for Annex B Item 4:

"Sample print-out of Official Receipts (OR)/ Sales Invoices (SI) generated by the machine legally showing the date required under RR 11-2004 and RR 10-2015 as amended by RR 16-2018 for all types of transactions, including discounted transactions (Regular Discount, Senior Citizen Discount, Persons with Disability (PWD) Discount, National Athletes and Coaches Discount, and Solo Parent Discount, whichever is applicable), and other charges that the Sales Machine/Software can cater (Packaging Charge, Delivery Charge, Service Charge, etc.)."

Prepared on: April 14, 2026
System: BIGTIME POS

---
